parent_selection_criteria.bluebook_rule: Brief Guide section 6; active criteria for selecting the senior parent compound.

parent_seniority_criteria_available.bluebook_rule: Brief Guide section 6; supported parent-seniority profile fields. The active subset is selected by parent_selection_criteria.

numbering_criteria.bluebook_rule: Brief Guide section 7; active parent-numbering criteria by parent class.

indicated_hydrogen_retained_names.bluebook_rule: P-14.7, P-22.2, P-25; retained heterocycle names and indicated hydrogen locants

single_atom_cations.bluebook_rule: P-72; cation and salt component names

single_atom_anions.bluebook_rule: P-72; anion names for halide components

mononuclear_parent_hydrides.bluebook_rule: P-13 replacement nomenclature; mononuclear non-carbon parent hydrides

replacement_parent_oxoacid_specs.bluebook_rule: P-13 replacement nomenclature; functional parent hydrides described by central atom and ligand counts

retained_ionic_n_parents.bluebook_rule: P-14.4 and P-22; retained saturated N-heterocycle cation parent names

saturated_n_ring_ionic_parents.bluebook_rule: P-22 replacement nomenclature; inferred saturated N-heterocycle cation parent names by ring size

N:+.reason: Positive parent nitrogen charges are rendered as parent suffix operations.

*:-.reason: Negative parent atoms are rendered as parent anion suffix operations.

heteroatom_charge_prefixes.bluebook_rule: P-61 and P-72; charged heteroatom substituent prefixes

anion_suffix_placements.bluebook_rule: P-14.4; parent anion suffix placement before terminal characteristic suffix stacks

values.reason: Ketone suffix parents with an anionic parent atom are rendered as oxo prefixes plus parent ide suffix.
Acyclic aldehyde suffix names need the carbanion ide operation before the aldehyde suffix.
Ring carbaldehyde suffixes need the carbanion ide operation before the characteristic-group suffix.
Dinitrile suffixes need the carbanion ide operation before the characteristic-group suffix.
Locanted carbonitrile suffixes need the carbanion ide operation before the characteristic-group suffix.
Unlocanted carbonitrile suffixes need the carbanion ide operation before the characteristic-group suffix.
Parent anion suffixes must precede terminal characteristic suffix stacks.

salt_metal_names.bluebook_rule: P-72; ordering of ionic components in additive names

simple_selanyl_prefixes.bluebook_rule: P-61.2.2.2; selanyl substituent prefixes by chalcogen analogue

halogen_lambda_suffixes.bluebook_rule: P-14.1, P-14.5; lambda convention and heteroatom substituent names

retained_ring_elements.bluebook_rule: P-22 and P-25; retained heterocycle names supported by this implementation

ring_descriptor_templates.bluebook_rule: P-23 and P-24; ring descriptor rendering templates

polycycle_prefixes.bluebook_rule: P-23.1; von Baeyer polycycle prefixes by bridge count

direct_group_prefixes.bluebook_rule: P-63, P-64, P-65; characteristic groups named only by prefixes in substituent context

chain_external_carbonyl_groups.bluebook_rule: P-44.3, P-65.1; carbonyl-containing suffix groups attached to a carbon chain

prefix_groups_to_skip.bluebook_rule: P-41, P-44, P-63; groups handled by dedicated parent/suffix logic before prefix fallback

ester_like_prefix_groups.bluebook_rule: P-65.6; esters and peroxy esters named with alkoxycarbonyl or related prefixes

amide_like_prefix_groups.bluebook_rule: P-66.1; amides and thioamides as substituent prefixes

amide_prefix_bases.bluebook_rule: P-66.1; amide and thioamide prefix names

carboxy_prefix_groups.bluebook_rule: P-65.1; carboxy prefix for acids when not principal

cyano_prefix_groups.bluebook_rule: P-66.4; cyano prefix for nitriles when not principal

sulfonyl_prefix_groups.bluebook_rule: P-67.1; sulfonic acids and sulfonates as prefixes

front_modifier_principal_groups.bluebook_rule: P-65.6, P-67.1; ester and sulfonate front modifiers

n_substituent_principal_groups.bluebook_rule: P-62, P-66; N-substitution locants for amines, amides, imines, hydrazones, and hydrazines

functional_groups.bluebook_rule: Unified functional-group metadata. Add or override functional groups here with role, suffix templates, locant policy, multiplication strategy, handlers, and optional family tags.

retained_substituent_stems.bluebook_rule: P-13.6 and retained parent substituent forms

ambiguous_connection_substituent_stems.bluebook_rule: P-13.6; explicit attachment locants avoid ambiguous retained-ring radical placement

connection_boundary_parent_stems.bluebook_rule: P-13.6; parent stems that retain optional 1-locants at prefix boundaries to avoid ambiguous OPSIN attachment

replacement_prefix_order.bluebook_rule: P-51; skeletal replacement prefix citation order

unsaturation_order.bluebook_rule: P-31; double-bond infixes precede triple-bond infixes

substituent_sort.bluebook_rule: P-14.5; detachable prefix alphabetization after ignored descriptors

postprocess_literal_replacements.bluebook_rule: Ordered retained-name and contracted-prefix post-processing replacements

values.reason: Contract systematic alkyloxy spelling to retained methoxy.
Contract systematic alkyloxy spelling to retained ethoxy.
Contract systematic alkyloxy spelling to retained propoxy.
Contract systematic alkyloxy spelling to retained butoxy.
Contract systematic aryl oxy spelling to retained phenoxy.
Use retained carbamoylamino prefix spelling.
Use retained carbamoyl prefix spelling.
Use retained sulfamoyl prefix spelling.
Use valid formamido morphology for formyl-amido contraction.
Contract explicit locanted vinyl substituent to ethenyl.
Contract explicit locanted vinyl substituent to ethenyl.
Remove unnecessary parentheses around simple ethenyl prefix.
Remove unnecessary parentheses around simple benzyl prefix.
Remove unnecessary parentheses around simple benzyloxy prefix.
Contract explicit locanted ethynyl substituent to ethynyl.
Contract explicit locanted ethynyl substituent to ethynyl.
Use retained hydrazinyl prefix for aminoamino.

postprocess_regex_replacements.bluebook_rule: Ordered regex post-processing replacements that are safe to apply before legacy post-processing

values.reason: Remove invalid locant on one-carbon retained functional names.
Remove invalid locant on one-carbon retained functional names.
Use retained common name for whole-component spelling.

postprocess_acyl_amido_terms.bluebook_rule: Acyl terms converted from amino to amido forms

postprocess_n_substituted_functional_suf.bluebook_rule: P-62, P-66, P-67; functional prefix suffixes whose leading parenthesized substituent is an N-substituent, not a carbon substituent on the acid parent

retained_monocycle_specs.bluebook_rule: P-22 and P-25; table-driven retained monocyclic parent recognition. Carbon count is inferred from ring size minus listed heteroatoms.

retained_fused_polycycle_specs.bluebook_rule: P-25 and retained fused/polycyclic parent names; graph signatures select retained families while locant maps remain graph-derived.
